name: opensubagents-skills
description: Catalog of Agent Skills used across the opensubagents stack — orchestrate paired MCP plugins, validate org-specific data shapes, and generate canonical reports.

skills.name: ts-bootstrap
skills.description: Bootstrap TypeScript projects in cloud web sandboxes by driving the @opensubagents/ts-bootstrap-mcp plugin's 7 tools. Scaffolds node-cli, cf-worker, mcp-server, or lib templates.

skills.name: reveal-and-restore-worker-token
skills.description: Operational pattern for rotating a Cloudflare Worker secret in place without leaking the token to chat history. Reveals, captures into a scoped env var, restores the binding, then unsets.

skills.name: html-effectiveness-builder
skills.description: Generate self-contained HTML artifacts matching the Thariq html-effectiveness gallery format (CSS custom properties, no JS deps, mobile-readable, clickable focus interaction).

skills.name: subagenttasks-validator
skills.description: Validate a tasks.json file against the canonical opensubagents/subagenttasks JSON Schema using ajv-2020. Returns parsed diagnostics with JSON pointers.

skills.name: graphql-erd-from-zod
skills.description: Derive a GraphQL ERD from a Zod schema file, then emit a Thariq-format interactive HTML diagram. The path used to bootstrap subagentarch.

skills.name: brief-author-canonical
skills.description: Author a brief in the canonical opensubagents/subagentbriefs shape (frontmatter + summary + body + initiatives + tasks-to-emit links). Validates against the brief schema before write.

skills.name: structured-research-output
skills.description: Deliver research findings as decomposed atomic items (numbered claims, vendor checklists with status markers, single decision block) instead of prose, and maintain a session-level URL ledger that accumulates every source touched during research.

skills.name: research-brief-xml
skills.description: Author or follow elaborate XML-tagged research briefs for high-stakes research tasks. Mode A follows an operator-supplied XML brief verbatim; Mode B drafts one from a casual request. Pairs with structured-research-output.
